Bitcoin News: Vancouver to Explore Bitcoin As A Reserve Asset
articles.description: In recent Bitcoin related news, Vancouver Mayor Ken Sim has proposed adding BTC to the city’s balance sheet to diversify investments. Sim announced this at a Vancouver City Council meeting on November 27, 2024. The proposal, “Preserving the City’s Purchasing Power Through Diversification of Financial Resources: Becoming a Bitcoin-Friendly City,” will be formally presented on […] The post Bitcoin News: Vancouver to Explore Bitcoin As A Reserve Asset appeared first on The Coin Republic.
